Prediction: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Stock Is the Safest AI Chip Bet TSMC has become the undisputed foundry leader.  Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (NYSE: TSM) may not design artificial intelligence (AI) chips, but it's a company that every AI chipmaker relies on.  The AI giants rely on TSMC to manufacture their number-crunching chip designs.
